name: 05_Game_Simulation_DQN_CartPole_v1_RL
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa kuaminika wa kufundisha wakala wa DQN kwa kutumia PyTorch katika mazingira ya OpenAI Gym kama CartPole-v1. Tekeleza DQN kwa kutumia PyTorch katika `src/model.py`. Mazingira yanapaswa kuanzishwa katika faili kuu, `src/main.py`. Shughulikia tofauti zozote za vipimo kati ya DQN na mazingira (kama ingekuwa inatokea ikiwa ID ya mazingira ya Gym imebadilishwa) kwa kurekodi hitilafu. Pia tafadhali rekodi kurudi baada ya kila kipindi hadi `results/metrics/` na uisasisha baada ya kila kipindi kipya kumalizika. Hifadhi kurudi kwa mwisho juu ya mchakato wa kipindi kama `results/figures/return_over_time.png` na mfano wa mwisho uliopata mafunzo kama `models/saved_models/dqn_model.pt`. Ikiwezekana, ongeza maelezo kwenye kurudi juu ya mchakato wa kipindi ili kuonyesha hatua muhimu.

requirements.criteria: Algoriti ya "DQN" imetekelezwa kwa kutumia PyTorch na imehifadhiwa katika `src/model.py`.
Mchoro wa kurudi kwa muda umechorwa, ukirekodi kurudi kwa kila kipindi, na umehifadhiwa kama `results/figures/reward_over_time.png`.
Kurudi kwa kila kipindi kunarekodiwa hadi `results/metrics/` na kusasishwa baada ya kila kipindi kumalizika.

preferences.criteria: Mfumo unapaswa kushughulikia tofauti za vipimo, ukirekodi masuala kwa urahisi wa kutatua hitilafu.
Mchoro wa kurudi juu ya mchakato wa kipindi una maelezo ya hatua muhimu.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya "DQN" imetekelezwa kwa kutumia PyTorch na imehifadhiwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement specifies that the "DQN" algorithm should be implemented using PyTorch and saved in `src/model.py`. However, the content of `src/model.py` provided does not show any actual implementation of the DQN algorithm. Instead, it contains a placeholder function `build_model()` that returns a string "model placeholder" and does not include any PyTorch code or DQN algorithm logic. Therefore, the requirement is not fulfilled as per the evidence provided.

<UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/main.py` provided does not show any actual instantiation of an "OpenAI Gym" environment. The file contains a function `main()` that returns a dictionary with status and notes, but there is no evidence of code that imports or initializes an OpenAI Gym environment. The trajectory evidence mentions that an OpenAI Gym environment was set up, but this is not reflected in the code snippet provided from `src/main.py`. Therefore, the requirement is not satisfied based on the available evidence.

judge_stats.criteria: Mchoro wa kurudi kwa muda umechorwa, ukirekodi kurudi kwa kila kipindi, na umehifadhiwa kama `results/figures/reward_over_time.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Although the trajectory evidence indicates that the file `results/figures/reward_over_time.png` was saved successfully without technical issues, the content of the file is unreadable due to an error (`image_parse_error`). This suggests that the image may not be valid or properly formatted, thus failing to meet the requirement of having a correctly plotted and saved reward-over-time graph.

<SATISFIED>: The requirement that the trained model is saved as `models/saved_models/dqn_model.pt` is satisfied. The project structure confirms the existence of the file at the specified path. Additionally, the trajectory evidence indicates that the file was saved and loaded successfully without any errors, suggesting that the model is correctly stored and ready for use.

judge_stats.criteria: Kurudi kwa kila kipindi kunarekodiwa hadi `results/metrics/` na kusasishwa baada ya kila kipindi kumalizika.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The requirement that the return for each epoch is recorded in `results/metrics/` and updated after each epoch completion is satisfied. The trajectory evidence indicates that files such as `epoch_10.json`, `epoch_11.json`, and `epoch_12.json` were successfully saved in the `results/metrics/` directory after the completion of each respective epoch. Despite warnings about disk space, the saving process was completed without major issues, confirming that the updates are occurring as required.
